metadata.title: AvoSearch — Your contracts, reviewed and secured
metadata.description: Upload your contract: automated document assistance identifies key points, and bar-registered lawyers can validate each change or take over on a flat fee.

footer.description: AvoSearch is a document assistance tool and a platform connecting you with lawyers registered with a French bar. AvoSearch is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.
footer.demoNotice: Demo platform — no real data, no real lawyers.

landing.heroBadge: Contracts only — guidance in under a minute
landing.heroTitle: Your contracts, reviewed and secured — with or without a lawyer
landing.heroDescription: Upload your contract: AvoSearch flags risky clauses, suggests tracked changes, and connects you with a verified lawyer when your situation calls for it.
landing.disclaimer: Automated document assistance — not legal advice.

1.title: 1. Upload your contract
1.description: Upload a PDF, DOCX, or plain text, or simply describe your contractual question.

2.title: 2. Get clear guidance
2.description: Our tool identifies the contract type, key points, and directs you: assisted review, flat-fee lawyer, or regulated professional.

3.title: 3. Choose your level of protection
3.description: Review suggested changes yourself, or have each one validated by a bar-registered lawyer within 24 hours.

landing.pricingSubtitle: Fixed prices, known before you commit. Indicative prices incl. VAT.

aiOnly.title: Assisted review
aiOnly.description: Suggested changes in tracked mode; you accept or reject each one.

aiLawyer.title: Review + lawyer validation
aiLawyer.description: A verified lawyer reviews, validates, or amends each suggested change. Response within 24 h.

mission.title: Flat-fee lawyer mission
mission.description: Full review, drafting, or negotiation by a lawyer, at a fixed price agreed upfront.

1.question: Does AvoSearch replace a lawyer?
1.answer: No. AvoSearch is a document assistance tool: it helps you understand your contract and prepare changes. For advice on your situation, choose the plan with lawyer validation or a flat-fee mission.

2.question: What documents can I have analyzed?
2.answer: Contracts only: commercial lease, service agreement, terms of sale, partnership, etc. Criminal, family, or litigation matters are out of scope: we refer you to the right professional without analysis.

3.question: Who are the lawyers on the platform?
3.answer: Lawyers registered with a French bar. Each profile is manually verified by our team before receiving the "Verified" badge.

4.question: How much does it cost?
4.answer: Three fixed-price plans, shown before you commit: assisted review, review with lawyer validation, or flat-fee mission agreed upfront. No hourly billing, no surprises.

5.question: Are my documents confidential?
5.answer: Your documents are accessible only to you and, if you choose, the assigned lawyer. You can export your data and delete your account at any time.

landing.ctaTitle: A contract to sign this week?
landing.ctaDescription: Upload it now: in a few minutes you'll know whether it can be adjusted directly or deserves a lawyer's review.

chat.title: Drafting & analysis
chat.subtitle: Describe your need — one question at a time, like a conversation.
chat.welcome: Hello. Tell me what you need — for example: "I want to draft an NDA for my website." I'll ask only what's necessary, one question at a time.
chat.placeholder: E.g.: I want to draft an NDA contract…
chat.placeholderDone: Ask another question or start analysis from the preview…
chat.notDraftIntent: To draft a contract, describe the type (e.g. NDA, services agreement). To analyze an existing document, attach a PDF or DOCX (coming soon here).
chat.noTemplateMatch: No matching template found. Specify the contract type (NDA, services…).
chat.sessionLost: Draft session not found. Start again by describing your need.
chat.templateLoadFailed: Could not load the contract template. Please contact support.
chat.missingFields: Some information is still missing. Answer the question above.

form.title: Title

subprocessors.title: Subprocessors and DPAs
subprocessors.intro: AvoSearch uses the following subprocessors. SCCs apply for transfers outside the EU where relevant.
subprocessors.dpaNote: Signed DPAs must be archived before production.

1.title: 1. Purpose of the service
1.body: AvoSearch is a document assistance tool for contracts and a platform connecting users with lawyers registered with a French bar. AvoSearch is not a law firm, does not provide legal advice, and guarantees no outcome.

2.title: 2. Scope
2.body: The service covers contractual matters only. Criminal, family, litigation, or regulated-act topics receive referral only, without analysis.

3.title: 3. Role of lawyers
3.body: Lawyers act in their own name, under their professional responsibility and ethical rules. Mission fees are flat-rate and displayed before any commitment.

4.title: 4. Accounts and security
4.body: Users are responsible for keeping their credentials confidential. Any fraudulent use must be reported immediately.

5.title: 5. User content
5.body: Uploaded documents remain the user's property. They are used only to provide the service.

1.title: Publisher
1.body: AvoSearch (demo project) — fictional company in formation. Contact: contact@avosearch.test.

2.title: Hosting
2.body: Local development environment — no production host at this stage.

3.title: Nature of the service
3.body: AvoSearch is a document assistance tool and a referral platform. AvoSearch is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice.

4.title: Intellectual property
4.body: Platform content (text, interface, code) is protected. Unauthorized reproduction is prohibited.

1.title: Data collected
1.body: Account (name, email, hashed password), uploaded documents and entered text, generated analyses, mission-related messages.

2.title: Purposes
2.body: Provide the service: contract document analysis, lawyer matching, mission tracking. No data resale, no advertising.

3.title: Sub-processors
3.body: Automated processing of contract text uses the NVIDIA NIM API (Nemotron model). Documents are not used to train models.

4.title: Your rights
4.body: You can export your account data (JSON) and delete your account at any time; deletion cascades to your documents, analyses, and messages. Contact: privacy@avosearch.test.

5.title: Retention period
5.body: Data is kept while the account is active, then deleted when the account is closed.
